researchAreas.title: Hydroinformatics
researchAreas.summary: Integrating data, computational modelling and information technology to turn hydrological data into decisions for managing water systems.

researchAreas.title: Rainfall-Runoff Modelling
researchAreas.summary: Representing how precipitation becomes streamflow across a catchment — from conceptual lumped schemes to physically based distributed models.

researchAreas.title: Urban Flood Forecasting & Early Warning
researchAreas.summary: Short-lead-time forecasting and alerting for pluvial, fluvial and coastal flooding by coupling rainfall nowcasts, drainage models and warning frameworks.

researchAreas.title: Hydrological & Hydrodynamic Modelling
researchAreas.summary: Simulating water movement through catchments, rivers and floodplains — from basin water balances to 1D/2D shallow-water solutions for flood extent and depth.

researchAreas.title: Remote Sensing & GIS for Water
researchAreas.summary: Using satellite and airborne observation with GIS to parameterise models and map floods where ground data are sparse.

researchAreas.title: AI / ML for Climate & Water
researchAreas.summary: Learning patterns from large hydrometeorological and climate datasets to improve forecasting, downscaling and emulation of complex water processes.

researchAreas.title: Decision-Support & Risk Communication
researchAreas.summary: Translating forecasts and risk assessments into tools, visualisations and impact-based information for planning, response and policy.

capabilities.title: Urban flood modelling — Hyderabad
capabilities.description: Incorporating satellite rainfall, optical remote sensing and crowdsourced data extraction.

capabilities.title: Riverine flood forecasting
capabilities.description: Hydrologic-hydrodynamic forecasting across Indian basins including the Brahmaputra, Godavari and Narmada.

capabilities.title: Real-time inundation forecasting
capabilities.description: Hydrologic-hydrodynamic and statistical-dynamical flood-inundation forecasting with national partners.

capabilities.title: Radar-based rainfall nowcasting
capabilities.description: Deep-learning rainfall nowcasting and forecasting from radar reflectivity data.

capabilities.title: Hydrologic-hydraulic modelling
capabilities.description: Building and validating models with tools such as HEC-RAS, MIKE+ and SWMM.

capabilities.title: Crowdsourced flood intelligence
capabilities.description: Flood data via SnapFlood and flood-information extraction from social media.
